title: Fig. 3 in Two parthenogenetic millipede species/lines of the genus Poratia Cook & Cook, 1894 (Diplopoda, Polydesmida, Pyrgodesmidae) found free from Wolbachia bacteria
author: Witzel, K.-P.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 3. Agarose gel picture showing the results of PCR analysis of Poratia digitata egg DNA using specific WOB76f/WOB1012r primers, to illustrate the presence of eubacteria, but no Wolbachia.
steps_raw: Fig. 3. Agarose gel picture showing the results of PCR analysis of Poratia digitata egg DNA using specific WOB76f/WOB1012r primers, to illustrate the presence of eubacteria, but no Wolbachia.
